name: PT Dewata Freightinternational Tbk
summary: PT Dewata Freightinternational Tbk provides freight forwarding, vehicle rental, distribution management, and construction services. It engages in trade and mining services; and provides cargo shipment services, including loading, unloading containers, repackaging, shipping door to door, storing hazardous and non-hazardous, and handling cargo that requires cooling storage system. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Dewata Freightinternational Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bimada Paramita Adhyana.
